chunks.page_summary: This page provides an overview of flow-through cells designed for the Rheonics SRD inline density and viscosity meter, detailing their construction material and purpose.
product_names: SRD - Inline Density and Viscosity Meter
chunks.extracted_text:
Phone: +1 713 234 0863

SRD flow through cells

Modified on: Tue, 19 Dec, 2023 at 5:15 PM

What products are involved?
SRD - Inline Density and Viscosity Meter (https://rheonics.com/products/inline-density-meter-srd/)

What is the purpose of this article?
This article provides an overview of the flow through cells available for the Rheonics SRD sensor.

1. Introduction
Rheonics inline density and viscosity meter SRD can be installed on many standard off-the-shelf flow adapters. In addition, Rheonics also offers different flow-through cells custom designed for the SRD probe. These cells are made of Stainless Steel 316L (1.4435) and designed to ensure good flow around the sensing element, optimize fluid volume in the flow cell and minimize pressure drop.
Next table mentions the flow cells available from Rheonics for the SRD.

Flow through cells for SRD density and viscosity meter
Flow cell | Sensor connection (Code) | Process connection
key_facts: Rheonics inline density and viscosity meter SRD can be installed on many standard off-the-shelf flow adapters.
Rheonics offers custom-designed flow-through cells for the SRD probe.
The flow-through cells are made of Stainless Steel 316L (1.4435).
The flow-through cells are designed to ensure good flow around the sensing element, optimize fluid volume in the flow cell, and minimize pressure drop.
This article provides an overview of the flow-through cells available for the Rheonics SRD sensor.

chunks.page_summary: This page displays two models of flow-through cells for Rheonics SRD density and viscosity meters, detailing their specifications, connection types, and providing links to product pages, drawings, and CAD models.
chunks.extracted_text:
Flow through cells for SRD density and viscosity meter

IFC-34N-SRD: 3/4” NPT Inline flow cell for SRD
(https://rheonics.com/product-accessories/ifc-34n-srd/)
Rated up to 200 bar.
Fluid volume: 60 ml
Drawing (https://rheonics.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/IFC-34N-SRD.pdf)
- CAD model (https://rheonics.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Rheonics_IFC-34N-SRD.zip)
3/4” NPT
(SRD-X1-34N)
(https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000409841-srd-x1-34n-npt-3-4-)
(https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000409841-srd-x1-34n-npt-3-4-)

IFC-15T-34N-SRD: 3/4” NPT Inline flow cell for SRD - Tri-Clamp
(https://rheonics.com/product-accessories/ifc-15t-34n-srd/)
Rated up to 200 bar.
Fluid volume: 60 ml
Drawing (https://rheonics.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/IFC-15T-34N-SRD.pdf)
- CAD model (https://rheonics.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Rheonics_IFC-15T-34N-SRD.zip)
1.5” Tri-Clamp
(SRD-X3-15T)
(https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000410551-srd-x3-tri-clamp)
3/4” NPT
key_facts: Rheonics offers flow-through cells as accessories for their SRD density and viscosity meters.
The IFC-34N-SRD is an inline flow cell with a 3/4" NPT connection.
The IFC-15T-34N-SRD is an inline flow cell with a 1.5" Tri-Clamp process connection, and a 3/4" NPT connection for the SRD sensor.
Both listed flow cell models are rated for a maximum operating pressure of 200 bar.
Both listed flow cell models have a fluid volume of 60 ml.
Product pages, technical drawings (PDF), and CAD models (ZIP) are available for download for both IFC-34N-SRD and IFC-15T-34N-SRD.
Support articles are provided for the associated SRD sensor models: SRD-X1-34N and SRD-X3-15T.

chunks.page_summary: This page describes Rheonics flow-through cells, specifically an elbow tee accessory, for SRD density and viscosity meters, detailing available sizes, connection types, and compatibility with various probes and SRD models.
chunks.extracted_text:
Flow through cells for SRD density and viscosity meter

FET-XXT-XXT: Flow elbow shorten tee (https://rheonics.com/product-accessories/fet-15t-15t/) with Tri-Clamp connection.

Available for 1.5” and 2” sizes. E.g.: FET-20T-20T.

Drawing (https://rheonics.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Rheonics_FET-15T-15T.pdf) - CAD model (https://rheonics.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/10/Rheonics_FET-15T-15T.zip)

1.5” Tri-Clamp (SRD-X3-15T) (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000410551-srd-x3-tri-clamp))

2” Tri-Clamp (SRD-X3-20T)

Tri-Clamp

Also suitable for the SRD-X5 (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000411193-srd-x5-long-insertion-probe) variant and the SRV probe.
key_facts: The FET-XXT-XXT is a flow elbow shorten tee with Tri-Clamp connection.
The FET-XXT-XXT is available in 1.5 inch and 2 inch sizes.
An example model for the 2 inch size is FET-20T-20T.
Drawings and CAD models for FET-15T-15T are available via provided URLs.
The 1.5 inch Tri-Clamp variant for SRD-X3 is SRD-X3-15T.
The 2 inch Tri-Clamp variant for SRD-X3 is SRD-X3-20T.
The accessory is also suitable for the SRD-X5 long-insertion probe variant and the SRV probe.

chunks.page_summary: This page provides details on flow through cells, including elbow shorten tees and flow tee spool pieces, designed for Rheonics SRD density and viscosity meters, specifying their available sizes, connection types, and compatible sensor models.
chunks.extracted_text:
Flow through cells for SRD density and viscosity meter

FET-XXT-XXX: Flow elbow shorten tee with welding ports.
Available for 1.5” and 2” sizes. E.g.: FET-15T-XXX
(https://rheonics.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/Rheonics_FET-15T-XXX.pdf)
Drawing. (https://rheonics.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/Rheonics_FET-15T-XXX.pdf) - CAD model (https://rheonics.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/06/Rheonics_FET-15T-XXX.zip)

1.5” Tri-Clamp
(SRD-X3-15T (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000410551-srd-x3-tri-clamp))

2” Tri-Clamp
(SRD-X3-20T)
Also suitable for the SRD-X5 (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000411193-srd-x5-long-insertion-probe) variant and the SRV.
Welding

FTP-15T-XXT: Flow tee spool piece with Tri-Clamp connection.
Inlet/outlet available sizes of 2”, 3”, 4” and 6” Tri-Clamp. E.g:: FTP-15T-30T

1.5” Tri-Clamp
(SRD-X3-15T (https://support.rheonics.com/en/support/solutions/articles/81000410551-srd-x3-tri-clamp)). Also suitable for the SRV.
Tri-Clamp
key_facts: The page provides information on flow through cells for SRD density and viscosity meters.
The FET-XXT-XXX series includes flow elbow shorten tees with welding ports, available in 1.5-inch and 2-inch sizes.
The FTP-15T-XXT series includes flow tee spool pieces with Tri-Clamp connections, available in 2-inch, 3-inch, 4-inch, and 6-inch inlet/outlet sizes.
Both FET-XXT-XXX and FTP-15T-XXT flow cells are compatible with SRD-X3-15T, SRD-X3-20T, SRD-X5, and SRV sensors.
PDF drawings and CAD models are available for the FET-15T-XXX model.

key_facts: FTP-15T-XXX models are flow tee spool pieces designed with Tri-Clamp connections for SRD density and viscosity meters.
FTP-15T-XXX flow tee spool pieces are available with inlet/outlet sizes of 2, 3, 4, and 6 inches.
The SRD-X3-15T is associated with a 1.5-inch Tri-Clamp and welding connection.
The SRD-X3-15T is also suitable for use with the SRV product.
